[ignore_global]
^config/checksrc/
^config/workarounds/
^include/cfortran\.h$
^src/core/ppm_omp_assign\.h$
^src/core/symprefix\.h$
^include/xpfpa.*\.h$
^doc/makef90depends/example/

[ignore_fc_defs_problem]
^src/solver/[^/]*_multi\.f90$
^src/core/ppm_ncdf_dump_wrappers.f90$

[ignore_config_h_problem]
^src/xt/[^/]*\.h$
^src/xt_quicksort_base\.h$
^src/mpi-workarounds/[^/]*_wrap\.c$
^scripts/git-hooks/bre2pcre\.c$

[ignore_license_doc_header]
^src/mpi-workarounds/[^/]*_wrap\.c$

[ignore_local_variable_footer]
^src/mpi-workarounds/[^/]*_wrap\.c$
